source_filing: Apple Inc. FY2025 Form 10-K (filed 2025-11, fiscal year ended September 27, 2025)
original_text: Greater China net sales decreased during 2025 compared to 2024 primarily due to lower net sales of iPhone, partially offset by higher net sales of Mac.
modified_text: The 10-K confirms that Greater China net sales fell in fiscal 2025 versus 2024 solely because of lower iPhone net sales, with Mac providing a partial offset.
claim: Apple's Greater China net sales decline in FY2025 was caused solely by lower iPhone net sales, partially offset by higher Mac net sales.
citation_as_written: Apple Inc. FY2025 Form 10-K, Management's Discussion and Analysis (Segment Operating Performance)
notes: Source attributes the decline 'primarily due to' lower iPhone sales (a qualified, non-exhaustive cause); the claim escalates to certainty ('confirms', 'solely because of'), overstating the source's confidence and exclusivity.
